flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blue Ridge Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Blue Ridge Community College are 24% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($42.6k vs $34.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Blue Ridge Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 2.7k).
